name: Mio
description: Mio is a young girl who lived in an abandoned temple with orphans who lost their parents in the war. She is kind and caring as she tends to put others in priority instead of herself.

name: Rin Kaga
description: __Height__: 112 - 120 cm (3'6" - 3'9") Rin is a six-year-old girl and the the illegitimate daughter of Daikichi's grandfather, Souichi Kaga and and manga artist Masako Yoshii. After Souichi died, Masako abandoned Rin for the sake of her career as a Manga artist. Rin is very independent and mature for her age and is often dealing with issues on her own. name: Shinichi Sakurai
description: Shinichi Sakurai is a tall, introverted college student with short brown hair. Shinichi enjoys peace and quiet and likes playing video games. He prefers to be left alone, but despite his objections, he often ends up hanging out with [Hana](https://anilist.co/character/130665/Hana-Uzaki). Shinichi works at a college café run by [Mr. Asai](https://anilist.co/character/169505/Akihiko-Asai). ~!After learning his feelings for Hana, he quickly confesses resulting in the two going out.!~

name: Vergil
description: Vergil is Dante's twin brother and is also the main antagonist in Devil May Cry 3. After he is betrayed by Arkham he temporarily teams up with Dante near the end, before reverting to his villain role. Throughout the game, Vergil seeks to undo the seal of Sparda inside the Temen-ni-gru and claim the entirety of their father's power for his own, regardless of the effects this will have on the human world. name: Felix Robane
description: Felix Robane is a side character in the manhwa "Who Made Me a Princess", and serves as the main protagonist's personal guard. He is first seen in chapter six when Claude de Alger Obelia first meets Athanasia de Alger Obelia. He is assigned the role of Athanasia's personal guard when she is 5, and soon becomes quite close with her. Felix's mother was Claude's nanny, and the two were raised as bosom brothers. (Source: Who Made Me Princess Wikia)
mediaTitles: The Fated Magical Princess: Who Made Me a Princess

name: Genji Kamogawa
description: Head coach and founder of the Kamogawa gym. He fought as a prizefighter in Japan shortly after the end of World War II. Along with his friends, Ginpachi Nekota and Dankichi Hama, Kamogawa developed a style of fighting that both presumably became the forerunner of boxing in Japan and emphasized scientific theory in its techniques. name: Oushi Ashioki
description: Yuki's childhood friend who learned sign language for her and is very good at it. He has known Yuki since their childhood and he is concerned about her relationship with Itsuomi since he's in love with her.

name: Gaku
description: Gaku is an extremely powerful assassin under [Slur](https://anilist.co/character/272878/Uzuki). He wields a long cube-headed mace, the tip of which contains a powerful cannon. He usually covers this weapon with bandages. ~!He was able to massacre hundreds of JAA members and hold his own against [Takamura](https://anilist.co/character/272875/), an especially strong Order member. However he does permanently lose his right ear as a result of this fight.!~

name: Hideyoshi Kinoshita
description: Hideyoshi Kinoshita is a class 2-F student in Fumizuki Academy. A classmate of Akihisa since 1st grade. Hideyoshi is the fraternal twin of Yuuko Kinoshita, class ambassador for Class 2-A. He is also a member of the Drama Club. He is one of the most famous characters in the series and in the manga, particularly due to his gender neutrality. Unlike the rest of Class F, Hideyoshi is relatively calm and normal.
